subject: chemistry
title: 19M.1.SL.TZ2.7
question_html:
Which of the following would have the same numerical value for all elements in the same period?

A. Highest energy levels occupied

B. Energy sub-levels occupied

C. Orbitals occupied

D. Valence electrons
examiners_html: A challenging question with a high discrimination index. 46 % of the candidates chose the correct answer A (the highest energy levels occupied have the same numerical value for all elements in the same period). A high proportion of candidates chose C (orbitals occupied have the same value ….) and a significant proportion chose B (energy sub-levels occupied have the same value …).
